#include <sstream>
#include <iomanip>
using namespace std;

class Solution {
public:
    string discountPrices(string sentence, int discount) {
        vector<string> words;
        stringstream ss(sentence);
        string word;
        while (ss >> word) {
            if (isPrice(word)) {
                string num_str = word.substr(1);
                long long X = stoll(num_str);
                int discounted_cents = X * (100 - discount);
                int dollars = discounted_cents / 100;
                int cents = discounted_cents % 100;
                
                stringstream new_ss;
                new_ss << "$" << dollars << ".";
                new_ss.width(2);
                new_ss.fill('0');
                new_ss << cents;
                word = new_ss.str();
            }
            words.push_back(word);
        }
        
        string result;
        for (size_t i = 0; i < words.size(); ++i) {
            if (i != 0) {
                result += " ";
            }
            result += words[i];
        }
        return result;
    }
    
    bool isPrice(const string& word) {
        if (word.empty() || word[0] != '$') return false;
        if (word.size() == 1) return false;
        for (size_t i = 1; i < word.size(); ++i) {
            if (!isdigit(word[i])) {
                return false;
            }
        }
        return true;
    }
};

solution: 
```cpp
#include <sstream>
#include <vector>
#include <iomanip>
#include <cctype>

using namespace std;

class Solution {
public:
    string discountPrices(string sentence, int discount) {
        vector<string> words;
        istringstream iss(sentence);
        string word;
        
        while (iss >> word) {
            if (isPrice(word)) {
                string numStr = word.substr(1);
                long long num = stoll(numStr);
                long long discountedCents = num * (100 - discount);
                int dollars = discountedCents / 100;
                int cents = discountedCents % 100;
                
                ostringstream oss;
                oss << "$" << dollars << "." 
                    << setw(2) << setfill('0') << cents;
                word = oss.str();
            }
            words.push_back(word);
        }
        
        string result;
        for (size_t i = 0; i < words.size(); ++i) {
            if (i != 0) {
                result += " ";
            }
            result += words[i];
        }
        return result;
    }
    
private:
    bool isPrice(const string& word) {
        if (word.empty() || word[0] != '$') return false;
        if (word.size() == 1) return false;
        for (size_t i = 1; i < word.size(); ++i) {
            if (!isdigit(word[i])) {
                return false;
            }
        }
        return true;
    }
};
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(N)
space complexity: O(N)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution efficiently processes each word in the sentence exactly once, applying the discount and formatting as required. The use of integer arithmetic avoids floating-point precision issues, ensuring accurate results. The overall complexity is linear with respect to the length of the input string.
